heading: Report to Congress
label: 6107 Report to Congress
text: Not later than 2 years after , the Secretary shall submit to Congress a report on the results and effectiveness of the program carried out under this chapter, including recommendations concerning how the chapter might be improved and whether the program should be continued.October 17, 2006
notes: Amendments2006— substituted “2 years after ,” for “,”.Pub. L. 109–363October 17, 2006October 1, 2002
